name: proposalgenerator
description: Proposal chain for aotomatic requirement anlaysis and proposal creation

PreProcessing.name: ClientContext
PreProcessing.description: Extract client context (client name, industry, systems, pain points, strategic goals) with aspect cross-references as semantic bridge for downstream steps

PreProcessing.name: Formal
PreProcessing.description: Extract formal proposal requirements (delivery scope, deadlines, format constraints, submission rules, eligibility criteria) and mark them as binding or optional

PreProcessing.name: Constraints
PreProcessing.description: Extract project constraints (budget, timeline, technical restrictions, organisational boundaries) with aspect cross-references

Solution.name: SolutionCatalog
Solution.description: Derive a solution catalogue: cluster functional/non-functional requirements into thematic solution blocks with research briefs and clarification flags.

Solution.name: SolutionProposal
Solution.description: Research technologies and best practices per solution block via web search (with a mandatory user clarification gate for flagged blocks) and condense them into one unambiguous solution proposal.

Solution.name: ProductDesign
Solution.description: Derive a screen-by-screen product/UX design (feature and interaction behaviour) from the functional requirements; every behaviour traces to a requirement. No web research.

Solution.name: StaffingCatalog
Solution.description: Derive the roles/skills the proposed solution needs (each with a Profiler search brief) plus reference-search briefs. Deterministic, no external knowledge, no Profiler calls.

Solution.name: ProfilerMatch
Solution.description: Match real adesso colleagues and comparable projects via the Profiler MCP against the staffing catalogue; produce anonymised, role-based team entries and anonymised references. Mandatory clarification gate when matching is ambiguous.

Solution.name: Estimator
Solution.description: Deterministic effort estimation: derive work packages from the solution proposal and estimate per-role person-days. Sole source for the proposal price table. Depends on SolutionProposal and StaffingCatalog only, never on ProfilerMatch.

Consolidation.name: ExecutiveSummary
Consolidation.description: Generate a concise executive summary of the tender AND adesso's proposed solution. Runs first in Consolidation so it can incorporate the recommended solution from SolutionProposal and remain available to Proposal and the later Report.

Consolidation.name: ProposalOutline
Consolidation.description: Decide the adaptive proposal chapter structure: evaluate each rubric dimension against artifact evidence (present/activate/n/a), emit an ordered outline. Runs after ExecutiveSummary and all Solution artifacts, before Proposal. Does NOT consume OpenPoints or Report (both moved to the post-export Report phase).

Consolidation.name: Proposal
Consolidation.description: Generate a structured proposal draft following the adesso proposal template: 1) Initial Situation, 2) Subject Matter of the Proposal (solution, requirements, architecture, methodology, organisation, QA, operations), 3) Prices, 4) Terms and Conditions (standard text placeholders), 5) Binding Period, Annex A References/Profiles, Annex B Company Profile. Does NOT consume OpenPoints (moved to the post-export Report phase).

Consolidation.name: DocxExport
Consolidation.description: Convert the final ProposalResult.md into the adesso corporate-design proposal DOCX in the Code Interpreter (templates live in the CI image at /opt/assets/templates/docx/service_proposals/). Pure format transformation: pandoc body conversion with the selected template as reference-doc, then MERGE into a copy of that template to preserve the cover page and native Word TOC field, disable auto heading numbering, add chapter page breaks, fill the cover-page addressee. Content of ProposalResult.md stays byte-for-byte unchanged. Output named per the Proposal Filename rule (Proposal_<slug>.docx).

Consolidation.name: OpenPoints
Consolidation.description: Gap analysis within the requirement-bearing artifacts (Functional/Formal): identify aspects with no requirement mapped, evaluated per artifact namespace. Produces a JSON file listing uncovered aspects with severity and coverage statistics. Runs in the Report phase, AFTER the proposal DOCX export.

Consolidation.name: Report
Consolidation.description: Create summary report. Runs last, in the Report phase AFTER the proposal DOCX export. Batch files are releted to user-files container (not adesso skill set)
